descriptions.en-US: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份文件 JSON 对象：dirs 和 files 最多包含 10 条路径，每条路径不超过 4095 个字符；未选择全部目录时 dirs 必填；使用高级目录规则时 rule 必填，其中 0 表示全部文件，1 表示包含 files，2 表示排除 files

descriptions.en-GB: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
descriptions.en-US: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份时间 JSON 对象：rule 为 0 表示每小时、1 表示每天、2 表示每周、3 表示每月；每周规则的 day 范围为 [0, 6]（0 表示周日，1-6 表示周一至周六），每月规则的 day 范围为 [1, 31]，每周和每月规则均要求 day；hour 范围为 [0,23]，除每小时规则外均必填

descriptions.en-GB: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
descriptions.en-US: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份保留 JSON 对象：type 为 -1 表示永久保留，1 表示天，2 表示周，3 表示月，4 表示年；非永久保留时 value 必填；hasConf 用于开启高级保留策略，conf 包含 day、week、month 和 year 配置

descriptions.en-GB: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
descriptions.en-US: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups

help_descriptions.en-GB: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
help_descriptions.en-US: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 周期全备 JSON 对象：backupMode 为 0 表示不开启，1 表示开启；incrementNum 表示执行全量备份前间隔的增量备份次数

descriptions.en-GB: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB
descriptions.en-US: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB

help_descriptions.en-US: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份限速 JSON 对象：isLimitQos 为 0 表示不开启，1 表示开启；rateLimits 每项均要求 start 范围为 [0,23]、stop 范围为 [1,24]、uploadMb 范围为 [1,9999] MB

descriptions.en-GB: Backup directory rule: 0 includes all directories, 1 uses specified directories, and 2 uses advanced rules

help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份目录规则：0 表示全部目录，1 表示指定目录，2 表示高级规则

descriptions.en-GB: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files
descriptions.en-US: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup file JSON object: dirs and files contain at most 10 paths of at most 4095 characters; dirs is required unless all directories are selected; rule is required for advanced directory rules, where 0 includes all files, 1 includes files, and 2 excludes files
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份文件 JSON 对象：dirs 和 files 最多包含 10 条路径，每条路径不超过 4095 个字符；未选择全部目录时 dirs 必填；使用高级目录规则时 rule 必填，其中 0 表示全部文件，1 表示包含 files，2 表示排除 files

descriptions.en-GB: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
descriptions.en-US: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup schedule JSON object: rule is 0 hourly, 1 daily, 2 weekly, or 3 monthly; day is [0, 6] for weekly schedules (0 Sunday and 1-6 Monday-Saturday) or [1, 31] for monthly schedules, and is required for weekly or monthly rules; hour is [0,23] and required except for hourly rules
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份时间 JSON 对象：rule 为 0 表示每小时、1 表示每天、2 表示每周、3 表示每月；每周规则的 day 范围为 [0, 6]（0 表示周日，1-6 表示周一至周六），每月规则的 day 范围为 [1, 31]，每周和每月规则均要求 day；hour 范围为 [0,23]，除每小时规则外均必填

descriptions.en-GB: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
descriptions.en-US: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup retention JSON object: type is -1 permanent, 1 days, 2 weeks, 3 months, or 4 years; value is required unless retention is permanent; hasConf enables advanced retention and conf sets day, week, month, and year counts
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份保留 JSON 对象：type 为 -1 表示永久保留，1 表示天，2 表示周，3 表示月，4 表示年；非永久保留时 value 必填；hasConf 用于开启高级保留策略，conf 包含 day、week、month 和 year 配置

descriptions.en-GB: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
descriptions.en-US: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups

help_descriptions.en-GB: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
help_descriptions.en-US: Periodic full-backup JSON object: backupMode is 0 disabled or 1 enabled, and incrementNum sets the number of incremental backups between full backups
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 周期全备 JSON 对象：backupMode 为 0 表示不开启，1 表示开启；incrementNum 表示执行全量备份前间隔的增量备份次数

descriptions.en-GB: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB
descriptions.en-US: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB

help_descriptions.en-GB: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB
help_descriptions.en-US: Backup rate-limit JSON object: isLimitQos is 0 disabled or 1 enabled; each rateLimits item requires start in [0,23], stop in [1,24], and uploadMb in [1,9999] MB
help_descriptions.zh-CN: 备份限速 JSON 对象：isLimitQos 为 0 表示不开启，1 表示开启；rateLimits 每项均要求 start 范围为 [0,23]、stop 范围为 [1,24]、uploadMb 范围为 [1,9999] MB
